Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm feelin' down today, kid. You mind listenin' to what this old monk has to say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Those folks downstairs, they're probably around your age, eh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It looks like they're havin' fun drinkin' and dancin', but... you look closely, their eyes say otherwise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I bet they come here to relieve stress from the day. But, I wonder if any of 'em are actually enjoying themselves...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Stress won't go away unless you deal with the root of the issue... You can put it off, but it'll always come back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This place is more of a refuge than a club to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}If those kids really wanna relax, we should switch the music to the Heart Sutra, and...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...Hey! There's a microphone over there. Bring it over, kid! I'll perform a live sutra reading.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}...Is that supposed to be "really" in a good way? Or "really" in a don't-do-it way?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Don't just talk to talk, kid; say what you mean and get straight to the point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}...Eh, forget it! I don't feel like doing it anymore. It's too late to apologize, kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 13 17 15 114}...Don't underestimate me, kid. My reading of the Heart Sutra will change your life![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}...But, I guess you're right. This place is too small to recite it properly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I've got a kid around their age, y'know... My one and only son.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}He'll be 21 this year... Just a little older than you... if he's alive, that is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I felt an almost fatherly[n]concern from Mutatsu.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Perhaps because he was projecting[n]his feelings for his son...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]Mutatsu a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You think it's okay to leave the future of this country in the hands of these kids?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...I mean, what if they all end up like me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Well, it ain't like I've got high hopes for the future... Form is emptiness, emptiness is form.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Go home before it gets too late, alright? I'll see ya next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I said goodbye to Mutatsu[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
